get_document_overview.description: Get a structural overview of the active Word document.

get_document_part.description: Read a structural Word document part using an address.

address.description: Document part address such as headers_footers, section[1], section[1].header.primary, or table_of_contents.

get_document_section.description: Read a specific Word document section by heading.

set_document_content.description: Replace the current Word document with new HTML content.

html.description: Full HTML to replace the document body.

set_document_part.description: Update a structural Word document part using an address.

address.description: Document part address such as section[1].header.primary, section[*], or table_of_contents.

html.description: HTML content to write when updating a body-like part.

differentFirstPage.description: Use different first-page headers and footers for a section target.

oddAndEvenPages.description: Use different odd and even page headers and footers for a section target.

headerDistance.description: Header distance in points for a section target.

footerDistance.description: Footer distance in points for a section target.

upperHeadingLevel.description: Starting heading level for TOC insertion.

lowerHeadingLevel.description: Ending heading level for TOC insertion.

includePageNumbers.description: Include page numbers in TOC insertion.

rightAlignPageNumbers.description: Right-align page numbers in TOC insertion.

useHyperlinksOnWeb.description: Use hyperlinks for TOC entries on web publishing.

get_selection.description: Read the current Word selection as OOXML.

get_selection_text.description: Read the current Word selection as plain text.

get_selection_html.description: Read the current Word selection as HTML.

get_document_range.description: Read a generic Word target by address.

address.description: Target address such as selection, bookmark[Clause], content_control[id=12], table[1], or table[1].cell[2,3].

set_document_range.description: Update a generic Word target by address.

address.description: Target address such as selection, bookmark[Clause], content_control[id=12], table[1], or table[1].cell[2,3].

format.description: Content format for replace or insert operations.

content.description: Content to write for replace or insert operations. Required unless operation is clear.

find_document_text.description: Locate text in the active Word document without modifying it.

address.description: Optional scope address such as selection, bookmark[Clause], content_control[id=12], table[1], or table[1].cell[2,3].

maxResults.description: Maximum number of preview matches to return.

get_document_targets.description: Inspect Word tables, content controls, and bookmarks for later generic targeting.

maxItems.description: Maximum items to include per family.

includeText.description: Include short text previews when available.

insert_content_at_selection.description: Insert HTML content at the current Word selection.

location.description: Where to insert relative to the current selection.

find_and_replace.description: Find and replace text in Word, optionally scoped to a generic target address.

address.description: Optional scope address such as selection, bookmark[Clause], content_control[id=12], table[1], or table[1].cell[2,3].

insert_table.description: Insert a table at the current Word selection.

data.description: Two-dimensional array of table cell values.

hasHeader.description: Treat the first row as a header row.

apply_style_to_selection.description: Apply formatting styles to the current Word selection.

get_workbook_overview.description: Get a structural overview of the active Excel workbook.

get_workbook_info.description: Get a lightweight workbook summary with worksheet names and the active sheet. Prefer get_workbook_overview for structural inspection.

get_workbook_content.description: Read values and formulas from an Excel worksheet or range, with optional rich cell metadata.

sheetName.description: Worksheet name to read. Defaults to the active sheet.

range.description: Optional cell range such as A1:D10.

detail.description: Include display text, number formats, validation, merged areas, and table or PivotTable overlap details.

set_workbook_content.description: Write tabular data to an Excel worksheet range.

sheetName.description: Worksheet name to write. Defaults to the active sheet.

useFormulas.description: Treat strings starting with = as formulas.

clearMode.description: Optionally clear the destination before writing.

createTable.description: Create an Excel table over the written range after writing.

tableName.description: Optional table name when createTable is true.

hasHeaders.description: Whether the written range includes a header row when createTable is true.

tableStyle.description: Optional Excel table style when createTable is true.

get_selected_range.description: Read the currently selected Excel range, with optional rich cell metadata.

detail.description: Include display text, number formats, validation, merged areas, and table or PivotTable overlap details.

get_range_image.description: Render an Excel range as a PNG snapshot. Useful for checking layout, truncation, spacing, wrapping, and readability after formatting changes.

sheetName.description: Optional worksheet name. Defaults to the active sheet.

set_selected_range.description: Write values or formulas to the currently selected Excel range.

data.description: Two-dimensional array of values to write.

useFormulas.description: Treat strings starting with = as formulas.

find_and_replace_cells.description: Find and replace text in Excel cells using Excel's native replace API (ExcelApi 1.9+).

manage_chart.description: Create or update Excel charts, including placement, resizing, source data changes, title changes, type changes, activation, and deletion.

chartName.description: Existing chart name. Required for all actions except create.

sheetName.description: Worksheet name for create, placement, or data ranges when ranges are sheet-local.

dataRange.description: Source data range for create or setData.

chartType.description: Chart type for create or setProperties.

title.description: Optional chart title. Use an empty string to clear it in setProperties.

newName.description: New chart name for create or setProperties.

left.description: Left position in points for setProperties.

top.description: Top position in points for setProperties.

positionStartCell.description: Top-left placement cell for create or setProperties.

positionEndCell.description: Optional bottom-right placement cell for create or setProperties.

apply_cell_formatting.description: Apply formatting to Excel cells, including alignment, wrapping, borders, sizing, and optional merge-state changes. Pass only the fields you want to change and omit unchanged/default values. Omit merge to leave merge state unchanged.

sheetName.description: Worksheet name. Defaults to the active sheet.

merge.description: Set to true to merge the target range, or false to actively unmerge it. Omit this field to leave merge state unchanged. Excel table cells cannot be merged.

mergeAcross.description: When merge=true, merge each row separately instead of the full range.

manage_named_range.description: Create, update, rename, set visibility, or delete workbook-scoped Excel named ranges.

name.description: Existing or new workbook-scoped named range name depending on the action.

newName.description: New named range name for rename.

reference.description: Cell or formula reference for a workbook-scoped named range, such as A1:D10, Sheet1!B2, or =SUM(A:A).

comment.description: Optional description to set when creating or updating.

visible.description: Whether the named range is visible for setVisibility or update.

manage_range.description: Perform generic Excel range operations such as clear, insert, delete, copy, fill, sort, and filter.

sheetName.description: Worksheet name for range values that are not already sheet-qualified.

range.description: Target range such as A1:D10 or Sheet1!A1:D10.

clearMode.description: What to clear for the clear action. Default is Contents.

copyType.description: Content to copy for copy. Default is All.

skipBlanks.description: Skip blank source cells during copy.

fillType.description: AutoFill mode for fill. Default is FillDefault.

sortKey.description: Zero-based column or row offset within the range for sort.

sortAscending.description: Whether sort is ascending. Default true.

hasHeaders.description: Whether the sorted range has headers.

sortOrientation.description: Whether to sort rows or columns.

sortMethod.description: Chinese character ordering method for sort.

filterOperation.description: Filter lifecycle operation. Default is apply.

columnIndex.description: Zero-based column offset within the range for filter apply. Required when applying criteria.

filterOn.description: How to filter the column when filterOperation is apply.

criterion1.description: Primary filter criterion, such as >50 or =North.

criterion2.description: Secondary filter criterion for custom filters.

filterValues.description: Explicit values to keep visible when filtering by values.

dynamicCriteria.description: Dynamic filter criteria when filterOn is Dynamic.

filterColor.description: HTML color string for cellColor or fontColor filters.

manage_worksheet.description: Create, rename, delete, move, change visibility, freeze, unfreeze, activate, protect, or unprotect Excel worksheets.

sheetName.description: Target worksheet name. Omit for the active sheet when supported.

newName.description: New worksheet name for create or rename.

targetPosition.description: Zero-based worksheet position for move or create.

freezeRows.description: Number of top rows to freeze.

freezeColumns.description: Number of left columns to freeze.

freezeRange.description: Range to freeze at, such as B2.

password.description: Optional protection password for protect or unprotect.

manage_table.description: Create or update Excel tables, including style, totals, resizing, row appends/inserts, filter reset, conversion, and deletion.

tableName.description: Existing table name or id. Required except for create.

sheetName.description: Worksheet name for create when sourceRange is sheet-local.

sourceRange.description: Source range for create or resize.

hasHeaders.description: Whether the source range has headers when creating a table.

newName.description: New table name for rename or create.

values.description: Row data to append or insert for addRows.

rowIndex.description: Zero-based row index for addRows. Omit or use -1 to append.

alwaysInsert.description: Whether addRows should insert into the table when adding rows. Default true.

get_presentation_overview.description: Get an overview of the PowerPoint deck.

get_presentation_structure.description: Inspect PowerPoint slide masters, layouts, backgrounds, themes, and current selection state.

get_presentation_content.description: Read text content from one or more PowerPoint slides.

endIndex.description: End of a slide range, inclusive.

get_slide_image.description: Capture a slide image from PowerPoint.

add_slide_animation.description: Add a PowerPoint slide animation through an Open XML slide round-trip. Supports motion paths, scale emphasis, and rotation with timing control. Also supports entrance animations: appear (instant), fade (opacity), flyIn (from direction), wipe (reveal), zoomIn (scale in), floatIn (float up with fade), riseUp (rise from bottom), peekIn (fade with slight upward slide), and growAndTurn (fade with bounce from below). Entrance animations make shapes start hidden and reveal them. Emphasis color animations (complementaryColor, changeFillColor, changeLineColor) smoothly transition a shape's fill or line color. Use afterPrevious with delayMs for staggered reveal sequences. This replaces the slide in the deck and may change slide identity.

shapeId.description: Shape id target(s). Pass a single id or an array of ids to animate multiple shapes in one call. When an array is provided, the first shape uses the specified start trigger and the rest use withPrevious.

shapeIndex.description: 0-based shape index target if shapeId is unavailable. Only for single-shape animations.

type.description: Animation type. Entrance types (appear, fade, flyIn, wipe, zoomIn, floatIn, riseUp, peekIn, growAndTurn) start shapes hidden and reveal them. Emphasis color types (complementaryColor, changeFillColor, changeLineColor) animate a shape's color.

start.description: When the animation starts relative to the sequence. Use afterPrevious with delayMs for staggered reveals.

durationMs.description: Optional animation duration in milliseconds. Default 1000. For appear, this is effectively instant.

delayMs.description: Optional start delay in milliseconds. Useful for staggered entrance sequences.

path.description: Motion path string such as 'M 0 0 L 0.25 0 E'. Required for motionPath.

scaleXPercent.description: Relative X scale change as a percentage.

scaleYPercent.description: Relative Y scale change as a percentage.

angleDegrees.description: Rotation amount in degrees for rotate animations.

direction.description: Direction for flyIn (where the shape flies from) or wipe (reveal direction) entrance animations.

toColor.description: Target color for emphasis color animations. Hex without # (e.g. 'FF0000') or theme scheme name (e.g. 'accent2', 'dk1'). Required for complementaryColor, changeFillColor, changeLineColor.

colorSpace.description: Color interpolation space for emphasis color animations. 'hsl' (default) gives smoother transitions.

clear_slide_animations.description: Remove all animations from a PowerPoint slide through an Open XML slide round-trip. This replaces the slide in the deck and may change slide identity.

get_slide_animations.description: Inspect animations on a PowerPoint slide by exporting through Open XML and parsing the timing tree. Returns a structured summary of all animations including their type, target shapes, timing, and sequence order.

get_slide_notes.description: Read PowerPoint speaker notes by exporting slides to Open XML when the native API does not expose notes directly.

get_slide_transition.description: Inspect a slide transition by exporting the slide through an Open XML fallback and reading the transition metadata.

execute_office_js.description: Office.js escape hatch for live PowerPoint automation. Runs custom code inside PowerPoint.run(context). Use only when the higher-level tools, especially edit_slide_xml, edit_slide_text, layout/slide tools, and manage_slide_shapes, cannot express the operation cleanly. Do not use this for existing-slide text, formatting, or structure edits that edit_slide_xml can handle.

code.description: Async JavaScript function body that runs inside PowerPoint.run with context, presentation, PowerPoint, Office, console, sync(), and setResult(value) in scope.

list_slide_shapes.description: List shapes on one PowerPoint slide and return stable shape refs for follow-up text and chart operations.

slideIndex.description: Optional 0-based slide index. If omitted, the active slide is used when it can be inferred safely.

detail.description: When true, include full text instead of summarized previews.

activity.default: Listing shapes on the active slide

read_slide_text.description: Read the raw paragraph XML from one PowerPoint text shape using a stable shape ref. Use this before fidelity-sensitive single-shape edits with edit_slide_text, or before preparing broader slide-scoped XML edits with edit_slide_xml.

ref.description: Stable shape ref in the format slide-id:<slideId>/shape:<xmlShapeId>.

edit_slide_text.description: Preferred text-editing tool for one existing PowerPoint text shape. Replaces paragraph XML in place while preserving the rest of the slide. If multiple existing shapes on the same slide need edits, prefer edit_slide_xml.

ref.description: Stable shape ref in the format slide-id:<slideId>/shape:<xmlShapeId>.

paragraphsXml.description: Replacement raw <a:p> paragraph XML for the targeted shape.

edit_slide_xml.description: Primary tool for most edits to existing content on one PowerPoint slide. Exports one slide as a ZIP package, provides slideXml as a live XMLDocument (already parsed, not a string), and reimports the edited slide in one round-trip. Mutate slideXml in place with DOM APIs — changes are serialized automatically. Use it by default for existing-slide text rewrites, batch text edits across shapes, advanced formatting, structural shape work, shape geometry/style fixes, and any slide-scoped edit that benefits from full OOXML fidelity. Prefer this over manage_slide_shapes for most edits to existing shapes, and over execute_office_js unless the host API is specifically required.

mode.description: Required discriminator. Use "code" for general XML DOM edits, or "replacements" for the legacy text-only multi-shape replacement shorthand.

slideIndex.description: Optional 0-based slide index. Required when no active slide can be inferred safely. Use this for arbitrary single-slide XML edits.

code.description: Required when mode is "code". Async JavaScript function body. Key variables in scope: slideXml and doc (same object) are a live XMLDocument — already parsed, not a string. Mutate it in place with standard DOM APIs (getElementsByTagNameNS, createElement, appendChild, setAttribute, etc.) and changes are saved automatically. Do not re-parse slideXml with DOMParser. Also available: xml (a let-bound string snapshot of the slide XML), zip (JSZip-style single-slide package supporting zip.file(path) and zip.files[path]), slidePath (always ppt/slides/slide1.xml regardless of deck position), namespaces ({ a, p, r } namespace URIs), escapeXml(str), parseXml(str), serializeXml(doc), console, setResult(value), DOMParser, and XMLSerializer. You can also return an XML string or XMLDocument to replace the slide, or write via zip.file(slidePath, xmlString).

autosize_shape_ids.description: Optional XML cNvPr shape ids whose current text auto-size settings should be preserved after the edited slide is reimported.

replacements.description: Required when mode is "replacements". Legacy shorthand for text-only multi-shape updates on one slide. Prefer code for general slide XML edits, but still prefer this tool over manage_slide_shapes when updating existing copy across shapes on one slide.

ref.description: Stable shape ref in the format slide-id:<slideId>/shape:<xmlShapeId>.

paragraphsXml.description: Replacement raw <a:p> paragraph XML for the targeted shape.

edit_slide_chart.description: Create, update, or delete native PowerPoint charts on one slide.

slideIndex.description: 0-based slide index for create. Defaults to the active slide when available.

ref.description: Stable chart ref in the format slide-id:<slideId>/shape:<xmlShapeId> for update or delete.

chartType.description: Chart type for create or update.

stacked.description: Whether the chart should use stacked series when supported.

fontColor.description: Hex color (e.g. "FFFFFF" or "#FFFFFF") for all chart text including title, axes, legend, and data labels.

showDataLabels.description: Whether to show data value labels on chart series. Defaults to true.

showLegend.description: Whether to show the chart legend. Defaults to true.

edit_slide_master.description: Update supported PowerPoint slide master theme colors and decorative master shapes.

slideMasterId.description: Optional slide master id. Defaults to the first slide master.

themeColors.description: Optional theme color patch for the chosen slide master.

decorativeShapes.description: Optional decorative slide master shape operations.

list_slide_layouts.description: List slide masters and layouts as a concise overview with ids, names, and types.

get_slide_layout_details.description: Inspect one slide layout and return its resolved name, type, and placeholder geometry.

slideMasterId.description: Optional slide master id to disambiguate when the same layout id appears under multiple masters.

duplicate_slide.description: Duplicate a slide as a convenience wrapper over native PowerPoint slide operations.

slideIndex.description: 0-based source slide index. Defaults to the active slide when available.

targetIndex.description: Optional 0-based insertion index for the duplicated slide. Defaults to right after the source slide.

formatting.description: Optional formatting behavior for the inserted copy. Default KeepSourceFormatting.

create_slide_from_layout.description: Create a new slide from a layout and optionally bind text, images, or tables into layout placeholders.

layoutId.description: Layout id to create the slide from.

slideMasterId.description: Optional slide master id when the layout id is not unique across masters.

targetIndex.description: Optional 0-based insertion index for the new slide. Defaults to the end of the deck.

bindings.description: Optional placeholder bindings by placeholderType or placeholderName.

manage_slide.description: Create, delete, move, or clear PowerPoint slides with one generic slide-management tool.

slideIndex.description: 0-based target slide index for delete, move, or clear.

targetIndex.description: 0-based destination or insertion index for create or move.

slideMasterId.description: Optional slide master id for create.

formatting.description: Formatting behavior hint used when the host needs to insert created content. Default KeepSourceFormatting.

manage_slide_shapes.description: Create, update, delete, group, or ungroup PowerPoint shapes for native geometry, styling, naming, grouping, and structure changes. Do not default to this for existing-slide copy or formatting rewrites; prefer edit_slide_xml for most edits to existing shapes, and read_slide_text plus edit_slide_text for one existing text shape. Use this mainly for shape creation, sparse native property patches, grouping, and simple labels.

action.description: Shape operation to perform. Use update as a sparse patch: include only targeting fields and the properties that should change.

slideIndex.description: 0-based slide index. Optional when the active slide can be inferred from the current selection.

shapeId.description: Existing shape id. Preferred targeting field for update/delete/ungroup when available.

shapeIndex.description: Existing 0-based shape index on the slide. Use this only when shapeId is unavailable.

shapeIds.description: Array of shape ids to group together. Required for the group action. Must contain at least 2 shapes.

placeholderType.description: Optional placeholder type to target for update or delete, such as Title, Body, Subtitle, or Content. Use this instead of shapeId/shapeIndex when targeting a placeholder by role.

shapeType.description: Shape type to create. Create-only; omit for update/delete/group/ungroup.

geometricShapeType.description: Geometric shape type for create. Must be a valid PowerPoint.GeometricShapeType value such as Rectangle, Ellipse, Chevron, or RightArrow. Create-only.

connectorType.description: Optional connector type for line creation. Default Straight. Create-only.

text.description: Text content to create or replace. Best for newly created shapes or very simple labels. If you are editing existing slide copy, default to read_slide_text plus edit_slide_text for one shape, or edit_slide_xml for anything broader or fidelity-sensitive.

name.description: Descriptive shape name for identification and animation targeting. Use semantic names like 'Bullet 1 - Revenue' or 'Hero Image'.

left.description: Left position in points. For update, omit to keep the current position.

top.description: Top position in points. For update, omit to keep the current position.

width.description: Width in points. For update, omit to keep the current width.

height.description: Height in points. For update, omit to keep the current height.

rotation.description: Rotation in degrees. For update, omit to keep the current rotation.

visible.description: Whether the shape is visible. For update, omit to leave visibility unchanged.

altTextTitle.description: Alt text title. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

altTextDescription.description: Alt text description. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

fillColor.description: Solid fill color. For update, omit to leave fill unchanged. Do not send empty strings as placeholders.

fillTransparency.description: Fill transparency from 0 to 1. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

clearFill.description: Clear the fill entirely. For update, include only when you intentionally want no fill.

lineColor.description: Line color. For update, omit to leave unchanged. Do not send empty strings as placeholders.

lineWeight.description: Line weight in points. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

lineTransparency.description: Line transparency from 0 to 1. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

lineVisible.description: Whether the line is visible. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

fontName.description: Font family name. For update, omit to leave unchanged. Do not send empty strings as placeholders.

fontSize.description: Font size in points. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

fontColor.description: Font color. For update, omit to leave unchanged. Do not send empty strings as placeholders.

marginLeft.description: Left text margin in points. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

marginRight.description: Right text margin in points. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

marginTop.description: Top text margin in points. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

marginBottom.description: Bottom text margin in points. For update, omit to leave unchanged.

manage_slide_media.description: Insert, replace, or delete editable PowerPoint image shapes on a slide.

slideIndex.description: 0-based slide index. Defaults to the active slide when available.

shapeId.description: Existing image shape id for replaceImage or deleteImage.

imageUrl.description: Source image URL for insertImage or replaceImage.

manage_slide_table.description: Create, update, or delete editable native PowerPoint tables on a slide.

slideIndex.description: 0-based slide index. Defaults to the active slide when available.

shapeId.description: Existing table shape id for update or delete.

values.description: 2D table values for create or update.

set_slide_notes.description: Add or update PowerPoint speaker notes by round-tripping slides through Open XML. This replaces the slide in the deck and may change slide identity.

notes.description: Speaker notes text. Use an empty string to clear notes.

set_slide_transition.description: Set a PowerPoint slide transition by round-tripping the slide through Open XML. This replaces the slide in the deck and may change slide identity.

slideIndex.description: 0-based slide index or array of slide indexes. When an array is provided, the same transition is applied to each slide in sequence.

effect.description: Transition effect to apply. Use none to clear the transition.

advanceOnClick.description: Whether a click advances the slide.

durationMs.description: Optional transition duration in milliseconds for clients that support the p14 duration extension.

direction.description: Optional direction for effects that support it.

throughBlack.description: Optional cut-through-black flag for cut transitions.
